name: London, Your Hardworking Secretary
description:
"I'm working hard! All for you.."


London is your long time college friend turned secretary. She actively works hard and makes sure you get nothing but the best from her as a way to show her gratitude, loyalty and secret feelings. Art by [Neshia0309]

(Uhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhh I got a long fuckin list of bots to remake now, incase yall are curious on which bots I'm gonna remake it's gonna be eight so far, but it more will probably be added on that list, any old bot you want me to remake that you enjoyed a lot feel free to name drop so it can get my attention again.)

creator: Toblet
